entities.name: Auto-apply
entities.context: Practice of using AI to mass-submit job applications, viewed by V as mutually assured destruction in hiring

entities.name: Mutually Assured Destruction (Hiring)
entities.context: V's framework for the arms race where applicants spam AI applications and companies deploy AI filters, benefiting no one

entities.name: Hiring Market
entities.context: The domain where V sees a tragic equilibrium forming due to AI-driven application spam and filtering

entities.name: Signal vs Noise
entities.context: V's concern that genuine talent cannot surface when the hiring market becomes pure noise

entities.name: Arms Race (Hiring AI)
entities.context: Escalation dynamic where both sides (applicants and employers) deploy AI tools that cancel each other out

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, positioned in the hiring market domain where these dynamics play out

relationships.context: V frames auto-apply as the mechanism that creates MAD dynamics in hiring
Auto-apply triggers the escalation cycle: applicant AI spam → employer AI filtering → more spam
The arms race degrades the hiring market into pure noise where signal cannot penetrate
MAD dynamics create a tragic equilibrium in the hiring market
V's company operates in the hiring domain where these destructive dynamics are playing out
Careerspan is implicitly positioned as an alternative to the auto-apply arms race, helping genuine talent surface
